headline: Why The Narrative Around MDU Resources Group (MDU) Is Shifting On Tighter Targets And 2026 Guidance
summary: Price target moves around MDU Resources Group have stayed relatively contained, with one cut of US$1 and one increase of US$4 framing a tight debate on where the shares should trade. Analysts are weighing these small adjustments against their existing earnings views, asking whether recent execution is enough to justify nudging targets higher or trimming them at the margin. As you read on, you will see how to track this evolving narrative and what to watch as new updates come through. Analyst...
